violations.text: The floor behind equipment in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The ceiling above the ice machine area in the basement is unfinished/ in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Various food was observed held between 42-50 degrees Fahrenheit in both prep units and 2 door slider. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in units were evaluated at the time of inspection. Per PIC, various food was just prepped and moved to properly functioning refrigeration. All other food was either voluntarily disposed of or moved at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in 2 door slider, or prep unit #1 until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, serviced will be called. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Turkey was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Potatoes were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Single use containers were observed being re-used for food storage. Single use container may not be re-used. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

2 door slider, prep unit #1, and prep unit #2 located in the kitchen area was observed not consistently maintaining a temperature of 41 DF or less and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the dish machine and inside of freezer units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The floor behind equipment in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the service area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed eggplant placed in the prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep and covered with plastic wrap at 63 degrees. PIC stated eggplant was prepared this morning; PIC uncovered and moved to refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Pork was observed thawing in the prep sink without running water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC placed in refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The non-commercial refrigerator was observed in poor repair, with a missing freezer handle and a torn gasket. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

The drain plugs for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The ceiling above the ice machine is not covered/protected. The ceiling must be made of a material that is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
